metadata.task: Determine the speed ratio v_object_2 / v_object_3 after an explosion from rest using momentum conservation. Output the ratio and its inverse as two numbers.
metadata.description: Work from the Conservation of Momentum in Explosions scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: The LLM uses momentum conservation to relate the fragment masses and velocities.
reasoning: The total momentum before and after the explosion remains zero, so m2*v2 = m3*v3. Object_3 has twice the density of object_2 with the same size, so v2/v3 = 2 and v3/v2 = 0.5.
